routines.name: lotarea
routines.summary: Compute area of a selected closed LWPOLYLINE and label centroid with sq ft and acres.

routines.name: parcellabel
routines.summary: Full parcel label: centroid lot number + area block, plus bearing+distance text on every perimeter segment.

routines.name: lotnum-auto
routines.summary: Auto-number selected lot polylines in order along a user-picked frontage line.

routines.name: bndcheck
routines.summary: Audit boundary polyline: closure, segment count, curve count, zero-length segments.

routines.name: bndtxt
routines.summary: Write a plain-text metes-and-bounds description of a closed polyline to a user-named .txt.

routines.name: beardist-label
routines.summary: Bearing+distance label drawn parallel to a picked LINE entity.

routines.name: sta-offset-label
routines.summary: Station+offset labels relative to a reference polyline, multi-pick loop.

routines.name: mark-monument
routines.summary: Insert monument block at picked points; auto-fills NORTHING/EASTING/ELEV/TYPE/DATE attributes.

routines.name: text-rotate-northup
routines.summary: Flip selected TEXT/MTEXT rotation 180 deg when upside-down so labels read from north-up plan view.

routines.name: text-mask-toggle
routines.summary: Toggle background mask on selected MTEXT entities.

routines.name: bubble-callout
routines.summary: Insert numbered callout bubble (CIRCLE + TEXT) at picked points, with xdata link to a schedule.

routines.name: surveycheck
routines.summary: Drawing audit: required layers, text styles, xrefs, frozen layers that still hold entities.

routines.name: xrefcheck
routines.summary: Xref status report (ATT/OVR, nested, path, resolved on disk).

routines.name: linetype-audit
routines.summary: List entities whose linetype, color, or lineweight is overridden (not ByLayer/ByBlock).

routines.name: entity-count-by-layer
routines.summary: CSV census of model-space entities grouped by layer and entity type.

routines.name: purge-safe
routines.summary: Purge unused named objects but skip an office-defined protected list of layers/blocks/styles.

routines.name: block-explode-attribs
routines.summary: Explode block references but preserve each attribute value as MText at its original position.

routines.name: match-elev
routines.summary: Copy Z (elevation) from one picked entity to many target entities.

routines.name: pl-elev-set
routines.summary: Set Z on every vertex of a picked LWPOLYLINE or heavy POLYLINE.

routines.name: pl-2d
routines.summary: Flatten selected polylines and other entities to Z=0.

routines.name: break-pl-at-vertex
routines.summary: Break an LWPOLYLINE into two at the nearest vertex to a screen pick.

routines.name: units-imperial-set
routines.summary: Set drawing units / unit-mode system variables to U.S. survey imperial defaults.

routines.name: c3d-stylecheck
routines.summary: Audit Civil 3D style collections (point, point-label, surface, alignment) via the AeccApplication COM API.

routines.name: batch-save
routines.summary: Save every open drawing without closing; skip drawings that have never been saved.

routines.name: zoom-extents-all-tabs
routines.summary: Zoom Extents on every layout (and model) tab; restore the originally-active tab when done.
